creator: nimrodl@gmail.com
text: After the last update using the packages in the 2017Q1 branch, I noticed some broken images in my feed.  Trying to load the images on their own showed that they were being cached on the tt-rss server and were giving me an error about an undefined function mime_content_type(). Google and the php documentation showed me that this function is part of the fileinfo extension.  Installing that package resolved the issue.
